title: The Best of Both Worlds: Accurate Global and Personalized Models through Federated Learning with Data-Free Hyper-Knowledge Distillation
abstract: Heterogeneity of data distributed across clients limits the performance of global models trained through federated learning, especially in the settings with highly imbalanced class distributions of local datasets. In recent years, personalized federated learning (pFL) has emerged as a potential solution to the challenges presented by heterogeneous data. However, existing pFL methods typically enhance performance of local models at the expense of the global model's accuracy. We propose FedHKD (Federated Hyper-Knowledge Distillation), a novel FL algorithm in which clients rely on knowledge distillation (KD) to train local models. In particular, each client extracts and sends to the server the means of local data representations and the corresponding soft predictions -- information that we refer to as ``hyper-knowledge". The server aggregates this information and broadcasts it to the clients in support of local training. Notably, unlike other KD-based pFL methods, FedHKD does not rely on a public dataset nor it deploys a generative model at the server. We analyze convergence of FedHKD and conduct extensive experiments on visual datasets in a variety of scenarios, demonstrating that FedHKD provides significant improvement in both personalized as well as global model performance compared to state-of-the-art FL methods designed for heterogeneous data settings.
summary: 论文提出FedHKD，一种面向异构数据的联邦学习算法，通过数据无关的超知识蒸馏在客户端进行本地训练。每个客户端提取本地数据表示的均值及对应软预测（超知识）并上传至服务器，服务器聚合后广播以辅助客户端训练。该方法无需公共数据集或生成模型，在提升个性化模型性能的同时维持高精度的全局模型，解决了现有pFL方法牺牲全局性能的问题。
idea: 通过客户端共享本地数据表示均值和软预测（超知识），服务器聚合后广播，支持客户端进行知识蒸馏训练，从而在异构数据联邦学习中同时获得准确的全局与个性化模型。
innovation: 提出超知识蒸馏联邦学习框架FedHKD，利用简洁的统计信息（表示均值与软预测）实现数据无关的知识蒸馏，替代公共数据集或生成模型，兼顾全局与个性化性能。

innovation_points.point: 使用“超知识”（表示均值和软预测）进行联邦知识蒸馏，无需依赖公共数据集或生成模型。
innovation_points.evidence: each client extracts and sends to the server the means of local data representations and the corresponding soft predictions -- information that we refer to as 'hyper-knowledge'.  unlike other KD-based pFL methods, FedHKD does not rely on a public dataset nor it deploys a generative model at the server.

innovation_points.point: 通过服务器聚合超知识并广播，支持客户端本地知识蒸馏，平衡全局模型准确性与个性化性能。
innovation_points.evidence: The server aggregates this information and broadcasts it to the clients in support of local training. ... providing significant improvement in both personalized as well as global model performance.

innovation_points.point: 提供收敛性分析理论支撑。

flow_steps: 各客户端基于本地数据训练模型，提取表示均值和对应软预测作为超知识。
客户端将超知识发送至中央服务器。
服务器聚合超知识（如求平均），并将聚合结果广播到各客户端。
客户端利用接收的超知识进行知识蒸馏训练，更新本地模型。
重复上述步骤直至收敛，得到兼顾泛化与个性化的模型。
applications: 视觉分类任务中客户端数据高度异质、类别分布极不平衡的联邦学习场景，如移动设备图像分类、跨机构医疗影像分析等。
limitations: 实验仅限视觉数据集，在其他数据模态上的泛化性未经验证。

limitation_points.point: 实验仅在视觉数据集上进行。
limitation_points.evidence: 摘要中指出：'conduct extensive experiments on visual datasets'

citation_text: Huancheng Chen, Johnny Wang, Haris Vikalo (2023). The Best of Both Worlds: Accurate Global and Personalized Models through Federated Learning with Data-Free Hyper-Knowledge Distillation. arXiv.
